intent: Write a 3-source analysis on 'mental-health self-care products and their evidence base'. (1) One Stop Market shopping site — browse the health-household and beauty-personal-care categories and collect at least 4 relevant products (journal, weighted blanket, aromatherapy, light therapy). Record name, price, rating, review count. (2) Reddit — browse /f/science AND /f/TwoXChromosomes for posts on evidence for (or skepticism of) self-care tools. Collect at least 3 posts with title, score, comment count. (3) Wikipedia — open 'Self-care' and one therapy-related article (e.g. 'Light therapy') and extract 3-4 facts. The report must: (a) present storefront picks with stats, (b) tier each by 'evidence-based', 'promising', 'placebo territory' using Wikipedia, (c) integrate community experience, (d) close with two products worth trying and two to skip. Cite every claim.
